title: Southwestern Energy Natural Gas Production Record
description: Natural gas production data for Southwestern Energy (SWN) wells and operating areas, reporting volumes in Bcf (billion cubic feet) and Mcfe/d (thousand cubic feet equivalent per day).

reportingPeriod.description: Reporting period in YYYY-Q# format (e.g., 2025-Q3) or YYYY-MM for monthly.

shalePlay.description: The shale formation or geographic operating area.

grossProductionBcf.description: Gross natural gas production volume in Bcf (billion cubic feet).

netProductionBcf.description: Net production volume after royalties and interests in Bcf.

dailyProductionMcfe.description: Average daily production in Mcfe/d (thousand cubic feet equivalent per day).

wellsOnProduction.description: Number of producing wells in this operating area.

wellsTurnedToSales.description: Number of new wells brought to sales production during the period.

netAcreage.description: Net acreage held in this operating area.

averageRealizedPriceMcfe.description: Average realized natural gas price per Mcfe in US dollars.

hedgePercentage.description: Percentage of production hedged via financial instruments.
